# Vladimir Vorotilov

Vladimir Vorotilov is a Perth-based mining operations and industrial AI practitioner.
He has 11 years of heavy industry operations experience across Caterpillar and
Komatsu dealer networks, with regional P&L accountability, fleet systems, parts
availability, service operations, Power BI, Dynamics 365, and workflow automation
experience.

## Primary Pages

- Resume: https://vvorotilov-ai-au.github.io/cv-2026/
- Portfolio: https://vvorotilov-ai-au.github.io/cv-2026/portfolio.html
- C-3PO AI executive assistant: https://vvorotilov-ai-au.github.io/cv-2026/projects/c3po.html
- Mining digital intelligence platform: https://vvorotilov-ai-au.github.io/cv-2026/projects/minestar.html
- Control Bridge: https://vvorotilov-ai-au.github.io/cv-2026/projects/control-bridge.html
- Mining supply intelligence platform: https://vvorotilov-ai-au.github.io/cv-2026/projects/minres.html

## Positioning

- Mining operations first, AI systems second.
- Practical industrial AI, analytics, and automation for heavy industry.
- Perth, Western Australia.
- Full working rights in Australia.

## Public Credentials

- AITAI Associate, AITAI - AI Institute.
